headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Skids On Surging Oil Prices, Pare Losses As Broadcom, Nvidia Rise
summary: Dow Jones futures fell slightly after hours, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. The February jobs report is on tap. Costco Wholesale and Marvell Technology headlined earnings after the close.
